result.stdout:
dotnet-sphinx — generate Sphinx API reference from a C# project

Usage:
  dotnet-sphinx generate --project <path-to.csproj> --output <dir> [options]

Options:
  --project, -p   Path to the .csproj file (required)
  --output,  -o   Output directory for generated files (required)
  --config,  -c   Build configuration (default: Release)
  --framework, -f Target framework moniker filter (e.g. net8.0)
  --rst           Emit reStructuredText .rst files (default)
  --md            Emit MyST Markdown .md files
  --max-slug-length   Max file-name slug length (default: 96)
